title: Record: Loqui Auris — 10L + LoRA TTT (mean val_bpb=1.0865, 2 seeds)
body:
## Summary
* Mean val_bpb: 1.0865 (2 seeds: 1.0856, 1.0874)
* 10L d=512, 8 heads, 4 KV heads (GQA), MLP 3x, ReLU²
* EMA(0.997), SmearGate, BigramHash(4096), U-Net skips
* Per-document LoRA TTT: rank=8 on Q+V+LM head, AdamW lr=0.01, 2 epochs
* Batched TTT: 64 docs/GPU across 8 GPUs, ~225s total
* Artifact: ~15.7 MB (fits 16MB with ~294KB headroom)
* Platform: 8xH100 SXM, ~6000 steps in 600s

## Results
| Seed | val_bpb | Artifact | Fits? |
|------|---------|----------|-------|
| 42   | 1.0856  | 15.73 MB | YES   |
| 1337 | 1.0874  | 15.63 MB | YES   |
| Mean | 1.0865  |          |       |

Third seed pending (compute grant).

## Acknowledgments
* Training stack: PR #162 (raahilshah), PR #180 (thwu1)
* LoRA TTT approach: PR #512 (MatoTeziTanka), PR #77 (samacqua)
* EMA + TTT: PR #442 (sjp611)
